solution: defangIPaddr(address):
    return address.replace('.', '[.]')

efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW

Explanation: The provided solution uses the `replace()` method to replace all occurrences of the period character with a square bracket character. This method has a time complexity of O(n), where n is the number of characters in the string. Since the input string is fixed-length, the space complexity is O(1), which means it uses a constant amount of space regardless of the input size. The energy implications are low, as the solution only performs a single operation on the input string.
